title: session-storage-db C4 model
description: Container + component view of the storage layer after migration. System-context view is unchanged from current opencode (daemon serves API to TUI/admin/CLI).

systems.name: opencode daemon
systems.description: Per-user background process serving session interactions. This spec touches only the session-storage subsystem inside it.

containers.name: session-storage
containers.description: Subsystem owning session persistence. Replaces the previous filesystem-walk implementation in message-v2.ts.

containers.name: runloop
containers.description: Session-level orchestrator. Calls into session-storage for every read and write of message / part state.

containers.name: TUI / admin panel / CLI
containers.description: External readers issuing read-only queries via the storage interface.

containers.name: filesystem
containers.description: Underlying disk. Holds <sid>.db files plus surviving legacy <sid>/ directories during dual-track period.

components.name: Router
components.description: Per-call dispatcher. Detects whether <sid>.db or <sid>/ is the source of truth and routes to SqliteStore or LegacyStore. Implements DD-9 signature compatibility.

components.name: SqliteStore
components.description: SQLite-backed implementation. Owns connection pool, applies pragmas (DD-3), runs schema migrations (DR-5), implements CRUD for messages + parts + meta.

components.name: LegacyStore
components.description: Existing filesystem-walk implementation extracted into its own module. Read-only after dreaming mode reaches the session.

components.name: DreamingWorker
components.description: Idle-time background migrator. Scans for legacy sessions, runs three-stage atomic migration (DD-7 / DR-4), publishes Bus events. Inhabits the same daemon process (DD-14).

components.name: ConnectionPool
components.description: Bounded LRU pool of SqliteStore handles keyed by sessionID (DD-10). Closes idle connections after CONNECTION_IDLE_MS.

components.name: IntegrityChecker
components.description: Runs PRAGMA integrity_check on first open of a DB (DR-3). Caches result for the connection lifetime. Publishes session.storage.corrupted Bus event on failure.

components.name: MigrationRunner
components.description: Schema version manager. Compares meta.schema_version vs runtime expected, runs migration SQL in transaction (DR-5). Each version has a forward + rollback test pair.

components.name: InspectCLI
components.description: Debug CLI (DD-12). Subcommands list / show / check. Read-only access via SqliteStore + LegacyStore through Router.

relationships.description: runloop calls Session.messages / updateMessage / updatePart through Router (DD-9 signature compat)
TUI / admin panel / CLI issue read-only calls through the same Router interface
relationships.protocol: in-process function call (or HTTP → daemon → in-process)

relationships.description: Router dispatches to SqliteStore when <sid>.db exists
Router dispatches to LegacyStore when only <sid>/ exists
SqliteStore runs IntegrityChecker on first open
SqliteStore runs MigrationRunner if schema_version mismatches
DreamingWorker reads all messages + parts from LegacyStore
DreamingWorker writes to a fresh SqliteStore at <sid>.db.tmp, then atomically renames
session-inspect CLI calls Router for read-only access
